title: erigeron decipiens
intro: Erigeron decipiens, also known as Decoys Fleabane, is a perennial plant species within the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Erigeron decipiens can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
